title: Read skills/go/SKILL.md and reply with only the count of lin
objective: Read skills/go/SKILL.md and reply with only the count of lines starting with '## STEP'. Just the number.

failure_modes: Changing dispatch behavior without updating CLI smoke test
Delegated agents writing partial work into shared tree
Reclassifying results from truncated authoritative output
required_recon: Read orchestrate.py CLI entry points before editing
For multi-phase tasks: delegation requires isolation/patch/disjoint plan before mutation
Phase mutation needs permitted-files + proposed-changes + verification + rollback plan
search_evidence: grep function call sites of any changed function
Read the test file for the affected code path
negative_tests: Active-task JSON must NOT be mutated by --recon-bypass or --preflight-only
If phase says run-once-defines-result, save full output to file before classification
If authoritative output truncated, mark phase FAILED or restart once -- do not silently reclassify
claim_requirements: Must show active-task diff (or no-diff assertion) between pre/post dry-run
If user requested strict report format, final output must match it exactly
No live Stop JSON validation failure may remain when declaring DONE
